properties.remark: THIS TORNADO REPORT IS FROM THE EVENING OF MAY 22... 2016. PUBLIC REPORTED AND SENT IMAGES OF A BRIEF TORNADO OVER FAR EASTERN STUTSMAN COUNTY SOUTH OF INTERSTATE 94 BETWEEN YPSILANTI AND SPIRITWOOD. THE TORNADO WAS ON THE GROUND FOR APPROXIMATELY TWO MINUTES AND TRAVELED NORTH-NORTHEAST FOR ABOUT ONE MILE. NO DAMAGE WAS REPORTED SO THIS TORNADO IS RATED EF-0.

EARLIER REPORTS FROM EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT WERE OF DAMAGE TO A HOUSE. THE ROOF AND GARAGE WERE REPORTED TORN OFF THE HOME. LAW ENFORCEMENT NOW REPORTS THAT EYE WITNESSES DID SEE A TORNADO. THE NWS WILL DO A DAMAGE ASSESSMENT ON WEDNESDAY MORNING. TIME AND LOCATION OF EVENT ARE ESTIMATED AT 750 PM MDT AND 2 MILES WEST AND 1 MILE SOUTH OF MOTT.

EVENT WAS 818 PM MDT. WATER WAS RUNNING THREE FEET DEEP THROUGH SOME STREETS IN REGENT. DITCHES WERE OVERFLOWING ALONG THE ENCHANTED HIGHWAY NORTH OF REGENT AND WATER WAS RUNNING OVER THE ROAD. REPORTS OF THREE INCHES OF RAIN WERE RECEIVED. ROADS WERE CLOSED OFF AND TRAFFIC WAS BEING DIVERTED. THERE WERE NO REPORTS OF INJURIES NOR FATALITIES. WATER WAS RECEDING AS OF 1000 PM MDT.
